attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Database I/O
attributes.description: Per-database file I/O bytes, latency, and operations by direction and file type.

params.markdown:
## [SQL Server OTel] Database I/O

This dashboard tracks per-database file I/O:
- I/O bytes and operations by direction (read/write) and file type (ROWS/LOG)
- I/O latency (wait time) per file
- Database and log file I/O trends
- Replication throughput (replica data rate)

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_latency = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.latency)), total_ops = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.operations))
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = CASE(total_ops > 0, (total_latency / total_ops) * 1000, 0)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_latency = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.latency)), total_ops = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.operations))
| EVAL avg_latency_ms = CASE(total_ops > 0, (total_latency / total_ops) * 1000, 0)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.operations IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.operations))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.operations IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.operations))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.transaction.delay IS NOT NULL
| STATS delay = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.transaction.delay)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.transaction.delay IS NOT NULL
| STATS delay = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.transaction.delay)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.backup_or_restore.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.database.backup_or_restore.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.backup_or_restore.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.database.backup_or_restore.rate)

attributes.title: I/O bytes rate by database and direction

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown"), direction = COALESCE(attributes.direction, direction, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown"), direction = COALESCE(attributes.direction, direction, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: I/O latency rate by database and file type

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS latency_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.latency)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown"), file_type = COALESCE(attributes.file_type, file_type, "unknown")
| EVAL latency_rate_ms = latency_rate * 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS latency_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.latency)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown"), file_type = COALESCE(attributes.file_type, file_type, "unknown")
| EVAL latency_rate_ms = latency_rate * 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: I/O bytes rate by file type (ROWS vs LOG)

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), file_type = COALESCE(attributes.file_type, file_type, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), file_type = COALESCE(attributes.file_type, file_type, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: I/O bytes rate by direction (read vs write)

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction = COALESCE(attributes.direction, direction, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction = COALESCE(attributes.direction, direction, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown")
| SORT io_rate DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)) BY db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown")
| SORT io_rate DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction = COALESCE(attributes.replica.direction, replica.direction, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.replica.data.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction = COALESCE(attributes.replica.direction, replica.direction, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Top databases by I/O latency rate

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.database.latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)), latency_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.latency)), ops_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.operations)) BY db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown"), file_type = COALESCE(attributes.file_type, file_type, "unknown"), direction = COALESCE(attributes.direction, direction, "unknown")
| EVAL io_rate = COALESCE(io_rate, 0.0), latency_rate = COALESCE(latency_rate, 0.0), ops_rate = COALESCE(ops_rate, 0.0)
| EVAL latency_rate_ms = latency_rate * 1000
| SORT latency_rate_ms DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.io IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.database.latency IS NOT NULL
| STATS io_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.io)), latency_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.latency)), ops_rate = SUM(RATE(metrics.sqlserver.database.operations)) BY db = COALESCE(resource.attributes.sqlserver.database.name, "unknown"), file_type = COALESCE(attributes.file_type, file_type, "unknown"), direction = COALESCE(attributes.direction, direction, "unknown")
| EVAL io_rate = COALESCE(io_rate, 0.0), latency_rate = COALESCE(latency_rate, 0.0), ops_rate = COALESCE(ops_rate, 0.0)
| EVAL latency_rate_ms = latency_rate * 1000
| SORT latency_rate_ms DESC
| LIMIT 20
